meta.title: Nihongo (日本語) · Learn Japanese online
meta.description: An online Japanese school MVP with courses, materials, and free resources.

navigation.futureFeature: This will be added in a later phase

footer.description: An online school that brings Japanese and its culture closer at your own pace.
footer.mvpScope: Purchases, the classroom, and student access are outside this first version.

newsletter.title: Stress-free Japanese, delivered to your inbox.
newsletter.description: A short dose of vocabulary, culture, and practical advice to keep your motivation alive.
newsletter.success: Thank you! The demo form works; delivery will be connected later.

hero.title: Japanese is not learned through tricks. It is learned by walking the path.
hero.description: An online school combining method, culture, and guidance for Japanese-language students.

method.title: A new way to learn Japanese that works for you!
method.description: We respect your time and the way you study. You set the pace; we provide the map, practice, and guidance.

pace.title: Move at your own pace
pace.description: No stressful deadlines. You decide when to study and how far to go.

classroom.title: Your classroom is always open
classroom.description: Study wherever you want. You only need a connection and the desire to learn.

resources.title: Resources that genuinely help
resources.description: Clear exercises and materials for practice between lessons.

courseSection.title: A course that brings you a little closer to Japan

community.title: A school made of people. No shortcuts, but a team by your side.
community.description: We provide a clear path, explanations designed for learners, and a community that understands the challenge of learning something new.

testimonials.title: What learning with us feels like

first.quote: I finally understand why sentences are built this way.
first.author: Lucía · beginner level

second.quote: I can study without always feeling behind.
second.author: Marcos · thematic course

third.quote: The mix of language and culture keeps my curiosity alive.
third.author: Eva · A2 level

page.title: Japanese courses for every stage
page.description: Start from scratch, resume where you stopped, or focus on a specific skill.

annual.title: Annual Japanese courses
annual.description: A guided journey by level, with solid foundations and time to consolidate every step.
annual.catalogDescription: Level-based programs that combine structure, practice, and guidance.

a11.title: Beginner level from scratch
a11.description: Your first foundation in writing, vocabulary, and conversation.

a12.title: Beginner level II
a12.description: Consolidate what you have learned and begin expressing yourself more naturally.

a21.title: Elementary level I
a21.description: Expand your structures and understand everyday situations.

b11.title: Intermediate level I
b11.description: Move on to more complex texts and conversations.

b12.title: Intermediate level II
b12.description: Deepen and connect all your skills.

thematic.title: Thematic Japanese courses
thematic.description: Specific challenges for starting from scratch, improving grammar, or exploring a topic in depth.
thematic.catalogDescription: Shorter courses that address a specific need at your own pace.

travel.title: Japanese for travelers
travel.description: Phrases, customs, and resources to help you enjoy your trip.

kana.title: Hiragana and katakana
kana.description: Learn to read and write both syllabaries step by step.

grammar.title: Japanese grammar
grammar.description: Organize what you know and understand how the language works.

reading.title: Reading practice
reading.description: Improve pace, comprehension, and confidence with graded texts.

books.title: Books to keep learning
books.description: Readers and workbooks designed to turn curiosity into practice.

materials.title: Teaching materials
materials.description: Simple resources to organize your study and practice consistently.

free.title: Start learning for free
free.description: Try the method with short lessons and discover where to continue.

resources.sampleDescription: Sample content used to define the structure before adding the real catalog.

about.title: Much more than a screen with lessons
about.description: A project created to explain Japanese with clarity, context, and warmth.
about.methodTitle: Japan is easier to understand when language and culture move forward together.
about.methodDescription: The school combines a native perspective with explanations designed for the questions learners encounter.
about.mvpDescription: This MVP presents the public experience. Real profiles, the full team, and classroom access will arrive in later phases.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.description: Explain well before trying to impress.

consistency.title: Consistency
consistency.description: A little every day matters more than a sprint.

closeness.title: Warmth
closeness.description: Learning with support changes the journey.

contact.title: Let’s talk
contact.description: Tell us what you want to learn and we will help you find the best starting point.
contact.sectionTitle: We are on the other side
contact.formDescription: This form is interactive, although it does not send data to a service yet.
contact.success: Message prepared. Real delivery will be connected in a later phase.

cta.title: Japanese is easy—you only need to know a few things!

notFound.title: This page got lost along the way.

error.title: We could not display this page.
error.description: Try again. If the problem continues, return to the home page.
